debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
C : Category α
D : Category β
F G : Functor α β
η : @CategoryInContext.NaturalTransformation α β C D F G
h : @CategoryInContext.IsNatIso α β C D F G η
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
⊢ comp
      (have this := @h X;
      (fun f hf => f.inv) (Classical.choose ⋯) ⋯)
      (Functor.homF f) =
    comp (Functor.homF f)
      (have this := @h Y;
      (fun f hf => f.inv) (Classical.choose ⋯) ⋯)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose iX hiX using hx
    choose iY hiY using hy
    have invX : arrow X = iX.inv := by
      rfl
    have invY : arrow Y = iY.inv := by
      rfl
    subst invX
    subst invY
    have nat := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
    have leftInvY : η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv = D.id (F.F Y) := by
      simpa [hiY.hom_inv_id] using hiY.hom_inv_id
    have rightInvX : iX.inv ≫ η.arrow X = D.id (G.F X) := by
      simpa [hiX.inv_hom_id] using hiX.inv_hom_id
    calc
      iX.inv ≫ G.homF f
          = (iX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ iY.inv)) ≫ (F.homF f) := by
              simp [assoc, nat]
      _ = (D.id (G.F X) ≫ iY.inv) ≫ F.homF f := by
              simp [assoc, rightInvX, leftInvY]
      _ = F.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc]
